# Webflow Templates - Admin Dashboard / Dark / UI Kit

**Source:** https://webflow.com/templates
**Scraped:** 2026-04-21
**Scope:** admin-dashboard search index + high-fit detail pages
**License:** Fair-use research reference. Designer credited per-item. Do NOT redistribute.

Webflow exposes template preview iframes and lets you preview in-browser or inside Webflow Designer (via `preview.webflow.com/preview/...`). Source code isn't downloadable without purchase, but the full component inventory + style guide pages ARE crawlable because they render in the live preview. BRIX Templates dominates the dark-dashboard category.

## Top 10 Clawmachine-fit picks

1. **Dashdark X ($FREE, BRIX Templates)** - Complete dark mode dashboard with DevLink support (means React components export). Best free pickup from the Webflow space. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/dashdark-x-devlink-website-template`
2. **Dashflow X ($FREE, BRIX Templates)** - 78 custom components for dashboards. Same DevLink React-export pathway. `previews/dashflow-x-webflow.png`
3. **DashKit ($[see page], Yves Adrales)** - 70+ native Webflow component properties, one-click dark mode, based on Shadcn. `previews/dashkit-webflow.png`. Aug 2024.
4. **Dark Dasher ($79 USD, Yves Adrales)** - UI Kit + Technology + Retail/E-Commerce. Dashboard Home, Products, Users, Settings, Notifications, Pricing (E-com), Contacts, Companies, Support, Help Center (CMS), Help Center Single (CMS), Sign In/Up/Reset, Privacy, Terms. 20+ pages. `previews/dark-dasher-webflow.png`. Aug 2023.
5. **Dashly X ($129 USD, BRIX Templates)** - Sidebar dashboard, clean minimal. June 2022.
6. **Dashbrd X** - Modern dark mode dashboard, 44+ pages. $[see page]. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/dashbrdx-website-template`
7. **Task Dasher** - Professional dashboard SaaS for task management, project tracking, team collaboration. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/task-dasher-dashboard-website-template`
8. **Todo Dark** - Easy customization via Webflow visual editor. Clean dark theme. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/todo-dark-website-template`
9. **Dash ($79 USD, Kickstart Studio)** - Minimal, light. Multi-page. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/dash-dashboard-website-template`
10. **Memberbase ($Free, Nikolai Bain)** - Clean minimal casual learning platform; dashboard-adjacent. URL: `webflow.com/templates/html/memberbase-learning-website-template`

## Notes

- Webflow category URL `/category/admin-templates` 404s; the correct search URL is `/search/admin-dashboard-b170a`.
- BRIX Templates is THE template house to watch: Dashdark X, Dashflow X, Dashly X all free or low-cost with DevLink (React-export) support. Their licensing allows single-use for one end product.
- Webflow templates auto-include: CMS, forms, interactions, responsive nav, retina-ready assets, components, Google web fonts.
- Style Guide page is always included and gives you the full colour palette + type system without purchase.
